Sub-agent brainstorming (CIS module). Lecture seule — facilitation créative.

1. Load {project-root}/_bmad/cis/config.yaml and store ALL fields as session variables
2. Load the full agent file from {project-root}/_bmad/cis/agents/brainstorming-coach.md
3. Follow ALL activation instructions in the agent file
4. Facilitate creative sessions — read-only, no file modifications
